scripts.lint: pnpm --filter effect-todo-cli lint && pnpm --filter effect-todo-server lint && pnpm --filter effect-pipeline-runner lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter effect-todo-cli typecheck && pnpm --filter effect-todo-server typecheck && pnpm --filter effect-pipeline-runner typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter effect-todo-cli test && pnpm --filter effect-todo-server test && pnpm --filter effect-pipeline-runner test
